subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! The One, the Single One, biddeth thee to soar, upon the wings of divine knowledge, in the atmosphere of the All-Merciful's love, that perchance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احمد فرد احد میفرماید بجناحین عرفان در هوای محبت رحمن طیران نما که شاید از
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation, @presence of; reunion with God
